text: Implement Automated Publishing (X & Instagram) using Gemini CLI

status.comment: Implemented automated publishing system for Twitter/X and Instagram. Created TwitterPublisher (uses twitter-api-v2), InstagramPublisher (uses Graph API), and main publish.ts orchestrator. Features: dry-run mode, duplicate prevention via .published tracker, platform-specific publishing, one-post-per-run safety. Requires API credentials setup (documented in .secrets.example and README). Tested successfully in dry-run mode. Ready for production use once credentials are configured. Instagram requires public image URLs (CDN/S3/Cloudinary). Documentation complete with setup guides and usage examples.
